person.wealth_source: Robert Kraft built his fortune through Kraft Group, a diversified holding company founded in 1968 that operates in paper and packaging, sports (New England Patriots NFL franchise, Gillette Stadium), and real estate. His net worth is concentrated in Patriots ownership and Kraft Group assets.

net_worth.range_note: Forbes RTB seed; range is ±15% to acknowledge stock-price volatility.
net_worth.liquidity_notes: Wealth is primarily illiquid, concentrated in Kraft Group holdings and Patriots franchise ownership; limited public equity diversification.

rollup.tier_reasoning: Kraft's tier cannot be assigned without observable giving data; the pipeline has not yet filled. He operates a family foundation but has not signed the Giving Pledge, and his wealth is heavily concentrated in illiquid assets (Patriots ownership, Kraft Group holdings), which structurally constrains near-term liquidity. Until 990-PF filings or other documented grants surface, readers should treat this profile as pending rather than as evidence of low giving.
rollup.expected_5pct_tenure_method: 5% × net_worth_best × liquidity_pct × years_as_billionaire (uncapped tenure); computed by aggregate_v3.py
